The ShoppingCart class has four methods, all throwing NotImplementedException. I need to write a comprehensive MSTest test suite that covers:

1. AddItem - adding items, adding multiple items, adding same SKU (update?), invalid inputs
2. RemoveItem - removing existing items, removing non-existent items
3. CalculateTotal - empty cart, single item, multiple items, after removing items
4. ApplyCoupon - applying valid coupon, invalid coupon, effect on total

Let me create a test project. I'll need to set up a .NET test project with MSTest. Let me create the test file.
